Caption: Diagram of the parameters estimation method. Starting from the inputs: data and the mathematical statement of the equivalent circuit model. The core of the process is the parameters estimation phase. The parameters are identified by exploiting the Genetic Algorithm and therefore iterating till reaching a satisfactory reduction of the cost function that evaluates the distance between the original data and the model guess. The output of the process is the estimated model parameters organised in a look-up table.

Parameters of the Thevenin model estimated with different datasets. Respectively U O C open-circuit voltage, and R 0 ohmic equivalent resistance. The parameters refer to the equation reported in Table 1 Eq. (2). Fig. 8(c) reports the legend that holds for all the sub-figures above.
